title: Signature Operation
text: Signature Operation A Signature Operation is a Development Object that describes the public method of a signature. Characteristics Characteristics Object type code: opr Main Development Object? No Part of: Signature Contains: Signature Parameter , Property Generalization: Development Object Specializations: — Compilation Output: — URI format: sig: SignatureName :opr:OperationName Specialization Signature Operation specializes Development Object in the following ways: It has a Signature as parent object. It can have Signature Parameters as child objects. It has no code containers. Was this topic helpful? Like Dislike
